NO_VIEWER_DOWNSTREAM.text: Nothing is rendering or requesting the COMP; no downstream render or viewer is active.
NO_VIEWER_DOWNSTREAM.translation: You made the thing, but nothing is looking at it. TD only works when something asks to see the result.

WRONG_SPACE_OR_TARGET.text: The COMP is operating in a coordinate space or target context that does not match the renderer or scene.
WRONG_SPACE_OR_TARGET.translation: The object exists, but it’s in the wrong place or the wrong scene, so the camera or light never touches it.

MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.text: The COMP expects an input, binding, or assignment that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.translation: This operator needs to be hooked up or assigned to something, and that step never happened.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, draw calls, or heavy materials.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being asked to do too much at once and gives up.

FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_DECAY.text: A feedback or recursive relationship exists without attenuation or limits.
FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_DECAY.translation: The system is feeding its own output back into itself forever with no escape.

PYTHON_PER_COOK.text: Python callbacks or scripts execute every cook or frame.
PYTHON_PER_COOK.translation: A script is running constantly instead of occasionally, so everything slows to a crawl.

CASCADE_COOK.text: A single change forces many operators to recook repeatedly.
CASCADE_COOK.translation: One small change causes a chain reaction that never settles down.

MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.text: More than one operator, export, or callback is driving the same parameter.
MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.translation: Two or more things are fighting over control, so the result keeps changing.

IMPLICIT_STATE_DEPENDENCE.text: Behavior depends on prior-frame state that is never explicitly initialized.
IMPLICIT_STATE_DEPENDENCE.translation: What happens now depends on what happened before, but nothing ever set a clear starting point.

TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.text: Frame-based, event-based, or time-sliced logic are mixed without coordination.
TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.translation: Different parts of the system are running on different clocks, so nothing lines up.

NO_VIEWER_DOWNSTREAM.text: Nothing is rendering or requesting the COMP; no downstream render or viewer is active.
NO_VIEWER_DOWNSTREAM.translation: You made something, but nothing is looking at it. TouchDesigner only works when something asks for the result.

WRONG_LEVEL.text: You are modifying the COMP shell, but the behavior lives inside child operators.
WRONG_LEVEL.translation: You’re turning knobs on the box, but the real controls are inside the box.

MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.text: The COMP expects an input, binding, or parameter assignment that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.translation: This thing needs to be hooked up to something, and it isn’t.

INACTIVE_OR_HIDDEN.text: The COMP or its contents are inactive, hidden, or not enabled.
INACTIVE_OR_HIDDEN.translation: It exists, but it’s turned off or hidden.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, draw calls, or shader cost.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being asked to do too much at once.

CASCADE_COOK.text: Small changes trigger repeated recooking across many operators.
CASCADE_COOK.translation: One tiny change causes a chain reaction that never settles.

PYTHON_PER_FRAME.text: Python logic executes every frame or cook instead of on demand.
PYTHON_PER_FRAME.translation: A script is running constantly when it should only run sometimes.

FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_LIMITS.text: A feedback or recursive relationship exists without constraints.
FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_LIMITS.translation: The system is feeding itself forever with no brakes.

MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.text: Multiple sources are controlling the same parameter.
MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.translation: More than one thing is fighting over control.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous state that is never clearly initialized.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What happens now depends on what happened before, but nothing set a starting point.

TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.text: Different timing models are mixed without coordination.
TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.translation: Parts of the system are running on different clocks.

DATA_MISMATCH.text: The COMP receives data in a shape or type it does not expect.
DATA_MISMATCH.translation: The information coming in isn’t in the form this thing understands.

NO_SIM_ADVANCE.text: The simulation is not advancing because time, reset, or play state is not active.
NO_SIM_ADVANCE.translation: The physics clock isn’t running. Nothing moves until time is actually ticking.

MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.text: The COMP expects an input, binding, or assignment that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT_OR_BIND.translation: This operator needs to be connected or assigned to something, and it isn’t.

WRONG_SPACE_OR_TARGET.text: The COMP operates in a space or context that does not match the simulation.
WRONG_SPACE_OR_TARGET.translation: The object exists, but it’s not inside the same physics world.

UNBOUNDED_SIMULATION.text: The simulation becomes unstable due to excessive forces, constraints, or iterations.
UNBOUNDED_SIMULATION.translation: The physics math blows up because the system is being pushed too hard.

FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_LIMITS.text: A feedback or recursive relationship exists without damping or limits.
FEEDBACK_WITHOUT_LIMITS.translation: The simulation feeds back into itself forever with no brakes.

SOLVER_OVERWORK.text: The solver is doing too many calculations per step or per frame.
SOLVER_OVERWORK.translation: The physics engine is overloaded trying to solve everything at once.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous simulation state that is not explicitly reset or initialized.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What happens now depends on old physics leftovers you didn’t reset.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: Results depend on evaluation order of actors, forces, or constraints.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Things behave differently depending on which piece updates first.

TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.text: Simulation time and frame time are not aligned.
TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.translation: The physics clock and the frame clock are out of sync.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TD doesn’t bother making it.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The TOP expects an input texture or source that is not connected or available.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs an image coming in, and it doesn’t have one.

SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.text: The external or internal source is not active, initialized, or playing.
SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.translation: The thing that should be feeding this image isn’t turned on or running.

ZERO_RESOLUTION.text: The TOP is cooking at 0×0 resolution.
ZERO_RESOLUTION.translation: The image technically exists, but it has no size.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, bandwidth, or shader cost.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being asked to do more than it can handle.

FEEDBACK_LOOP.text: A feedback loop exists without resolution reduction or frame limiting.
FEEDBACK_LOOP.translation: The image feeds back into itself forever with no brakes.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The TOP is waiting on disk, network, or device input.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TD is stuck waiting for something outside the program.

DRIVER_OR_API_ISSUE.text: The graphics or capture API is unstable or unsupported on this system.
DRIVER_OR_API_ISSUE.translation: The driver or system layer isn’t cooperating.

UNDEFINED_ORDER.text: Multiple TOPs or processes affect the same texture without a defined order.
UNDEFINED_ORDER.translation: Several things touch the image, but TD never decided who goes first.

TIME_ASYNC.text: The TOP updates on a different timing basis than the rest of the network.
TIME_ASYNC.translation: This image updates on its own clock.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Texture format, color space, or bit depth changes unexpectedly.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The image changes shape or type under your feet.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t bother making it.

MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs an image coming in, and it doesn’t have one.

SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.translation: The thing that should be feeding this image is off, paused, blocked, or unavailable.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The TOP is blocked waiting on disk, network, or external device input.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is stuck waiting for something outside the program.

DRIVER_API_ISSUE.translation: Drivers or system-level tools are failing or incompatible.

UNDEFINED_ORDER.translation: Several things touch the image, but no one is clearly in charge.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t make it.

ZERO_RESOLUTION.text: The TOP is producing a 0×0 resolution image.
ZERO_RESOLUTION.translation: The image technically exists, but it has no size.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, shader cost, or texture count.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being pushed too hard.

FEEDBACK_LOOP.text: A feedback path exists without resolution reduction or frame limiting.
FEEDBACK_LOOP.translation: The image feeds back into itself forever.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Texture format, color space, or channel assumptions do not match.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The image isn’t shaped the way this operator expects.

SPACE_MISMATCH.text: The operation assumes a different coordinate or UV space.
SPACE_MISMATCH.translation: This node is working in a different map of the image than you think.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on operation order in a larger chain.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Where this node sits in the chain changes the outcome.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The TOP expects an input texture that is not connected.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Texture format, channel count, or color space does not match expectations.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The image isn’t structured the way this node expects.

KERNEL_SCALE_CONFUSION.text: Filter size or kernel parameters are scaled relative to resolution.
KERNEL_SCALE_CONFUSION.translation: The effect changes because the image size changed.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The visual result depends on operation order in the chain.

notes.Edge: Counted once; applies to all edge-detection variants.
notes.Luma Blur: Already counted with Blur; not duplicated.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t make it.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The TOP expects a render, depth, or geometry input that is not connected.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs something to render or read from, and it isn’t connected.

WRONG_RENDER_CONTEXT.text: The TOP is not bound to the correct camera, geometry, or render context.
WRONG_RENDER_CONTEXT.translation: You’re rendering the wrong scene, or no scene at all.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, draw calls, or shading complexity.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being asked to do too much.

RENDER_LOOP.text: A render or feedback loop exists without limits or separation of passes.
RENDER_LOOP.translation: You’re rendering something that depends on itself.

STATE_CHANGE_PER_FRAME.text: Render state or parameters are rebuilt every frame.
STATE_CHANGE_PER_FRAME.translation: The renderer keeps reinitializing instead of reusing work.

DEPTH_SPACE_MISMATCH.text: Depth values are interpreted in a different space or range than expected.
DEPTH_SPACE_MISMATCH.translation: Depth looks wrong because near/far or space assumptions don’t match.

PASS_ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on the order of render passes.
PASS_ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Changing the order of passes changes the result.

TIME_ASYNC.text: Render timing is not synchronized with upstream changes.
TIME_ASYNC.translation: The render updates on a different clock than the rest of the network.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t make it.

MISSING_RENDER_INPUT.text: The TOP expects geometry, camera, depth, or render input that is not connected.
MISSING_RENDER_INPUT.translation: There is nothing to render or read from.

WRONG_RENDER_CONTEXT.text: The TOP is bound to the wrong camera, geometry set, or render context.
WRONG_RENDER_CONTEXT.translation: You’re rendering the wrong scene, or no scene at all.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, draw calls, or shader complexity.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being asked to do too much.

RENDER_FEEDBACK_LOOP.text: A render or feedback loop exists without separation of passes.
RENDER_FEEDBACK_LOOP.translation: You’re rendering something that depends on its own output.

STATE_REBUILD.text: Render state or materials are rebuilt every frame.
STATE_REBUILD.translation: The renderer keeps starting over instead of reusing work.

DEPTH_RANGE_MISMATCH.text: Depth values are interpreted in a different space or range than expected.
DEPTH_RANGE_MISMATCH.translation: Near/far values or depth space assumptions don’t line up.

PASS_ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The visual result depends on the order of render passes.
PASS_ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Changing pass order changes what you see.

TIME_ASYNC.text: Render timing is not synchronized with upstream changes.
TIME_ASYNC.translation: The render updates on its own clock.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t make it.

SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.text: The external device, stream, or sensor is not active, initialized, or permitted.
SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.translation: The camera or sensor is off, blocked, or not allowed by the system.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The TOP expects an input texture or depth stream that is not connected.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs an image or depth feed, and it doesn’t have one.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, bandwidth, or heavy analysis shaders.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your graphics card is being pushed too hard.

FEEDBACK_LOOP.text: A feedback loop exists without decay, resolution reduction, or frame limiting.
FEEDBACK_LOOP.translation: The image feeds back into itself forever.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The TOP is blocked waiting on device drivers, USB, or network input.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is stuck waiting for hardware or the network.

DRIVER_API_ISSUE.text: The device driver or SDK is unstable, mismatched, or unsupported.
DRIVER_API_ISSUE.translation: The sensor software layer isn’t cooperating.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: The incoming image or depth format does not match expectations.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The data coming in isn’t shaped the way this node expects.

TIME_ASYNC.text: The TOP updates on a different timing basis than the rest of the network.
TIME_ASYNC.translation: This node is running on its own clock.

SENSOR_NOISE.text: The input data is noisy, unstable, or poorly calibrated.
SENSOR_NOISE.translation: The sensor data itself is jittery or unreliable.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this TOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking this image to exist, so TouchDesigner doesn’t make it.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The TOP expects an input texture or data source that is not connected.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs something coming in, and it doesn’t have it.

INVISIBLE_OUTPUT.text: The TOP is producing output, but it is transparent, zero-sized, or off-screen.
INVISIBLE_OUTPUT.translation: It’s working, but you can’t see it.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: GPU resources are exhausted due to resolution, UI redraw cost, or compositing complexity.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: The graphics card is doing too much UI work at once.

CASCADE_COOK.text: Small UI or data changes cause many operators to recook repeatedly.
CASCADE_COOK.translation: One tiny change triggers a chain reaction.

PYTHON_PER_FRAME.text: Callbacks or parameter expressions execute every frame.
PYTHON_PER_FRAME.translation: Scripts are running constantly instead of only when needed.

MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.text: More than one source is controlling the same visual or value.
MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.translation: Multiple things are fighting over control.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous values that are never explicitly reset.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What happens now depends on leftover state.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: Results depend on evaluation or layering order.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Changing the order changes the outcome.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this CHOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is listening to this data, so TouchDesigner doesn’t bother updating it.

SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.text: The external source, device, or file is not active, playing, or permitted.
SOURCE_NOT_ACTIVE.translation: The thing that should be producing sound or data is off or unavailable.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The CHOP expects input channels that are not connected.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs data coming in, and it doesn’t have any.

NO_TIME_ADVANCE.text: The CHOP depends on time, but time is not advancing or is paused.
NO_TIME_ADVANCE.translation: The clock isn’t moving, so nothing changes.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: Too much DSP or analysis is happening per frame.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your CPU can’t keep up with the audio math.

CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your CPU can’t keep up with the calculations.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The CHOP is blocked waiting on hardware, drivers, or external protocols.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is waiting on something outside the app.

BUFFER_MISMATCH.text: Sample rates or buffer sizes are mismatched, causing heavy resampling or stalls.
BUFFER_MISMATCH.translation: The timing of the data doesn’t line up.

MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.text: More than one CHOP or export is driving the same value.
MULTIPLE_DRIVERS.translation: Multiple things are fighting over control.

TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.text: Frame-based, device-rate, and event-based timing are mixed.
TIME_DOMAIN_MISMATCH.translation: Different parts of the system are running on different clocks.

CHANNEL_LAYOUT_MISMATCH.text: Channel count, naming, or ordering does not match expectations.
CHANNEL_LAYOUT_MISMATCH.translation: The data exists, but not in the shape this node expects.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous values that were never explicitly reset.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What happens now depends on leftover state.

MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs data coming in, and it doesn’t have any.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting a cook from this SOP.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is asking for geometry, so this node never runs.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The SOP expects input geometry that is not connected.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This node needs shapes coming in, and it doesn’t have any.

EMPTY_GEOMETRY.text: The SOP is operating on geometry that contains no points or primitives.
EMPTY_GEOMETRY.translation: There is geometry, but it’s effectively nothing.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: The SOP is performing expensive per-point or per-primitive operations.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Your CPU is being asked to do too much geometry math.

RECURSIVE_COPY.text: The SOP creates geometry that feeds back into itself without limits.
RECURSIVE_COPY.translation: You accidentally made geometry clone itself forever.

ATTRIBUTE_EXPLOSION.text: Large or growing attribute sets cause exponential processing cost.
ATTRIBUTE_EXPLOSION.translation: Too many attributes are being carried forward.

ATTRIBUTE_MISMATCH.text: Expected attributes are missing, renamed, or on the wrong class.
ATTRIBUTE_MISMATCH.translation: The node is looking for data that doesn’t exist where it expects.

TOPOLOGY_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on point order or topology that is not stable.
TOPOLOGY_DEPENDENCE.translation: Small changes in geometry structure change everything.

SPACE_MISMATCH.text: The SOP assumes a different coordinate space or orientation.
SPACE_MISMATCH.translation: This node is working in a different spatial frame than you think.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: The SOP’s behavior depends on previous frames or cached state.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see now depends on what happened before.

SPACE_MISMATCH.text: The POP assumes a different coordinate space or scale.
SPACE_MISMATCH.translation: The math is happening in a space you didn’t expect.

NO_RENDER_PATH.text: The material is not bound to any geometry or render path.
NO_RENDER_PATH.translation: This material isn’t actually being used anywhere.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The MAT expects textures, uniforms, or geometry context that are not provided.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: It needs inputs it isn’t getting.

SHADER_NOT_COMPILING.text: The shader failed to compile, so it silently falls back or does nothing.
SHADER_NOT_COMPILING.translation: The code didn’t build, so nothing draws.

GPU_OVERLOAD.text: The material performs expensive per-fragment or per-vertex work.
GPU_OVERLOAD.translation: The graphics card can’t keep up with the shading.

STATE_CHANGE_STALL.text: Frequent material or render-state changes cause GPU stalls.
STATE_CHANGE_STALL.translation: The GPU keeps stopping to switch modes.

TEXTURE_SYNC.text: The material waits on textures that are still cooking or streaming.
TEXTURE_SYNC.translation: Rendering is blocked waiting for images.

SPACE_MISMATCH.text: The material assumes a different coordinate or normal space.
SPACE_MISMATCH.translation: Lighting or mapping math is happening in the wrong space.

UNIFORM_CONFLICT.text: Multiple sources are writing to the same uniform or parameter.
UNIFORM_CONFLICT.translation: Several things are fighting over the same value.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: The material relies on renderer state set earlier in the pipeline.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see depends on what was rendered before.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting data from this DAT.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is reading this table or script, so it never runs.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The DAT expects incoming data, events, or a file path that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This DAT needs input, and it doesn’t have any.

CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.text: The DAT relies on callbacks or triggers that are never invoked.
CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.translation: The event you’re waiting for never happens.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: The DAT is executing expensive Python, parsing, or iteration every frame.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Too much code is running too often.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The DAT is waiting on disk, network, or external devices.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is stuck waiting on something outside itself.

INFINITE_LOOP.text: Script logic enters an unbounded loop or recursive call.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Incoming data does not match the expected structure or schema.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The data exists, but not in the shape this DAT expects.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on execution order relative to other DATs.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Running this before or after something else changes the result.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous values or stored state.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see now depends on what ran earlier.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting data from this DAT.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is reading this table or script, so it never runs.

MISSING_INPUT.translation: This DAT needs input, and it doesn’t have any.

CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.text: The DAT relies on callbacks or triggers that are never invoked.
CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.translation: The event you’re waiting for never happens.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: The DAT is executing expensive Python, parsing, or iteration every frame.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Too much code is running too often.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The DAT is waiting on disk, network, or external devices.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is stuck waiting on something outside itself.

INFINITE_LOOP.text: Script logic enters an unbounded loop or recursive call.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Incoming data does not match the expected structure or schema.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The data exists, but not in the shape this DAT expects.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on execution order relative to other DATs.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Running this before or after something else changes the result.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous values or stored state.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see now depends on what ran earlier.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting data from this DAT.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is reading this table or script, so it never runs.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The DAT expects incoming data, events, or a source that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This DAT needs input, and it doesn’t have any.

CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.text: The DAT relies on callbacks or triggers that are never invoked.
CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.translation: The event you’re waiting for never happens.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: The DAT is executing expensive Python, string ops, or table iteration every frame.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Too much code is running too often.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The DAT is waiting on serial, sockets, or external devices.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is stuck waiting on something outside itself.

INFINITE_LOOP.text: Script logic enters an unbounded loop or recursive call.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Incoming data does not match the expected structure or encoding.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The data exists, but not in the shape this DAT expects.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on execution order relative to other DATs.
ORDER_DEPENDENCE.translation: Running this before or after something else changes the result.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on previous values or stored state.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see now depends on what ran earlier.

NO_COOK_REQUEST.text: Nothing downstream is requesting data from this DAT.
NO_COOK_REQUEST.translation: Nothing is reading this table or script, so it never runs.

MISSING_INPUT.text: The DAT expects incoming data, events, or a source that is not provided.
MISSING_INPUT.translation: This DAT needs input, and it doesn’t have any.

CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.text: The DAT relies on callbacks or network events that are never invoked.
CALLBACK_NOT_FIRING.translation: The event you’re waiting for never arrives.

CPU_OVERLOAD.text: The DAT is doing heavy parsing, string ops, or table transforms every frame.
CPU_OVERLOAD.translation: Too much text or table work is running too often.

IO_BLOCKING.text: The DAT is blocked waiting on network, devices, or sockets.
IO_BLOCKING.translation: TouchDesigner is waiting on something outside itself.

INFINITE_LOOP.text: Script or callback logic enters an unbounded loop.

FORMAT_MISMATCH.text: Incoming data does not match the expected schema or encoding.
FORMAT_MISMATCH.translation: The data exists, but not in the shape this DAT expects.

ORDER_DEPENDENCE.text: The result depends on execution or arrival order of messages.

IMPLICIT_STATE.text: Behavior depends on cached state or previous messages.
IMPLICIT_STATE.translation: What you see now depends on what arrived earlier.
